statement: In every magma, Equation 2358 (`x = (y * (y * (z * z))) * w`) implies Equation 3704 (`x * x = (y * z) * (z * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0234
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op y (op z z))) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op (op y z) (op z z))
